name: Rovovi i Ruševine
description: Taktička igra na ratnoj mreži — probij 3 linije rovova sa odredom vojnika, 20 poteza, WWI 1917.

modules.src/main.js: Bootstrap, input loop, turn dispatch, game states (MENU/PLAYING/ANIMATING/GAMEOVER)
modules.src/config.js: Grid dims, unit stats, ammo costs, scoring thresholds, colors
modules.src/state.js: Game state shape, createState, save/load localStorage
modules.src/input.js: Mouse/touch cell selection, action toolbar clicks
modules.src/ui.js: DOM HUD (ammo, turn count, unit HP), score screen, action toolbar
modules.src/systems/grid.js: Grid matrix state, cell helpers, line-clear check
modules.src/systems/turn.js: Turn resolution pipeline (10 phases), animation event generation
